titleStmt.title: SII 34.279: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 279. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the wall of the south verandah of the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Mallikārjunarāya, Śaka 1384, Chitrabhānu, Āvani 12 = A.D. 1462, August 11.

Vīrapāṇḍya-Vijayālayadēva, the arasu of Chūraikkuḍi in Niyamappaṟṟu of Kēraḷasiṅgavaḷanāḍu gifted some land as dēvadāna excluding the kārāṅkiḻamai right. The old dēvadāna, paḷḷichchandam, and the tax-free land being enjoyed by the ‘patiṉeṇ kuḍimakkaḷ’ was exempted from this gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaṉ Irācātirācaṉ IrācaparamEcuraṉ śrīvīrappiṟatāpa tEvarāyamakārāya kumāra mallikāṟcuṉa rāyaṟku 1000 3 100 8 10 4ṉ
mēṟ cellā niṉṟa cittiṟa pāṉu varuṣam Āvaṇi mātam 10 2 nāḷ Irācarācavaḷa nāṭṭu vallanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār ti yarkku kēraḷa ciṅka
vaḷanāṭṭu niyamappaṟṟuc cūṟaikkuṭi Aracu tirumēṉi Aḻakiyārāṉa vīrapaā ṇṭiya vicaiyālaya tēvareṉ tiruppaṇi ceytu
Aruḷavum Āka kārāṅkiḻamai nīṅkalākat tēvatāṉamāka viṭṭa kāṉanāṭāṉa virutarācapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu kum pālaṉ
vayalukkum perunāṉkellai Āvatu kīḻpāṟkellai mala laikkuḷavāyil Ūṉṟiṉa kallellai kaṭai
yil Ūṉṟiṉa kallukkum Uḷa kaṇṭiṉ teṉkaraiyil Ūṉṟiṉa kallukku yakku vaṭakkum
mēlpāṟkellai peruṅkuṭikkuḷattu muṉ kuḷavāy Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapā kallukku teṟkum
Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḷḷiccantam paḻantēvatāṉa ḷum tāṉam
pūṟuvattil kaṇakku patineṇkuṭimakkaḷukku U ṉpa Iṟaiyiliyum nīkki kuḷaṅkaḷum kuḷa
vāyttalaikaḷum peruṅkuṭikkuḷamuṅ kuḷappa vāyttalaikaḷum peruṅku kiyamaramum
Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku tēvatāṉam Āka viṭṭa Inta tek kku nāṭu Aṟṟa mariāti caṇ kum Eṟcōṟu
kūṟṟarici Antarāyam kīṟṟu mākkalam maṟṟum ṭāṉa Eṟpayaṟpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum ttu mākkalam
Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkkut tēvatāṉam Āka naṭakkumpaṭi m cantirātittavarai cellakka
kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkuṭuttōm cūraikkuṭi Aracu tirumēṉi Aḻaki ku Iṉnāyaṉā
ṟku nam pērālum pūcai tiruppaṇikku viṭṭa peruṅkuṭi vayalukku caṟuvamāṉi va Āṇṭār Ā
ṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya vicaiyālaiya tēvareṉ Ippaṭikkāṉa nāṭu kōṭṭai Ūr vāṇātarāyaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku muṉicantai civalōkamuṭaiyāṉ kōṭṭai Ūr vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi ttu
Digital edition of SII 34.279 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
